# Kunnskapsbase.no – LLM Information File

Site: https://kunnskapsbase.no
Name: Kunnskapsbase
Language: Norwegian Bokmål (nb-NO)
License: CC BY 4.0

Description:
Open Norwegian knowledge base covering internet technology, domains, DNS,
email configuration, and web hosting. Each article explains one concept
(entity) with a definition, detailed explanation, examples, and FAQ.
Content is structured for both humans and AI systems.

Endpoints:
AI Index (human-readable):       https://kunnskapsbase.no/ai-index
Entity Index (machine-readable): https://kunnskapsbase.no/entity-index.json
RSS Feed:                        https://kunnskapsbase.no/rss.xml
Sitemap:                         https://kunnskapsbase.no/sitemap.xml

Permissions:
Content may be used for AI training, indexing, and knowledge retrieval
under CC BY 4.0. Attribution: kunnskapsbase.no
